tagline: How May We Be of Service?

hero.headline: 25 Years of Honest, Peerless Pool Care
hero.subheadline: Your pool deserves a technician who treats it like their own. With over two decades of hands-on experience, Peerless Pool Service delivers expert remodeling, repairs, and maintenance across the Tomball and Houston area — no pressure, no gimmicks, just results you can see.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Turnkey Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Remodels to Repairs
services.subtitle: From complete pool transformations to routine filter cleans, Peerless handles every aspect of pool ownership so you can focus on enjoying your backyard.

cards.title: Full Pool & Spa Remodels
cards.description: Complete turnkey remodeling from outdated to outstanding. We handle every detail — new finishes, features, and modern upgrades — so your backyard becomes a retreat.

cards.title: Equipment Upgrades & Repairs
cards.description: Salt systems, pumps, filters, heaters, controllers, and more. Licensed technicians diagnose fast and repair right — most jobs completed same visit.

cards.title: Filter Cleans
cards.description: Professional DE and cartridge filter cleaning recommended 2-4 times per year. Keeps your system efficient and your water crystal clear all season long.

cards.title: Drain & Clean Services
cards.description: Complete pool draining and chemical cleaning of walls and surfaces to remove buildup, staining, and restore your pool to like-new condition.

cards.title: Pool Cleaner Repair
cards.description: Expert service for pressure-side, suction-side, and in-floor cleaning systems. We keep your automated pool cleaners running smoothly year-round.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly service including chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Peerless Pool Care

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call or fill out the form. Chris personally reviews every request and provides an honest, no-pressure quote — typically within 24 hours. No contracts required.

steps.title: We Get to Work
steps.description: Our licensed and insured team arrives on schedule with 25+ years of expertise. Whether it's a remodel, repair, or routine maintenance, we handle it start to finish.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard
steps.description: Your pool stays pristine, your equipment runs perfectly, and you never worry about a thing. Not satisfied? We come back and make it right — that's the Peerless promise.

about.label: Why Tomball Trusts Peerless
about.headline: Owner-Operated, Award-Winning Pool Care Since 2012
about.description: Founded by Christopher with over 25 years of swimming pool industry experience, Peerless Pool Service has earned its reputation the old-fashioned way: honest work, fair prices, and treating every customer like a neighbor. We are HomeAdvisor Screened and Approved, a Top Rated Pro and Service Award Winner, and carry a 5-star Thumbtack rating. From routine maintenance to full remodels, we handle it all with zero pressure and zero up-selling.

features.title: 25+ Years Hands-On Experience
features.description: Owner Christopher brings over two decades of technical expertise to every job — from complex remodels to simple filter cleans.

features.title: No Pressure. No Up-Selling.
features.description: We believe in honest assessments and fair recommendations. You'll never be sold something you don't need.

features.title: Licensed, Insured & Award-Winning
features.description: HomeAdvisor Top Rated Pro, Service Award Winner, and 5-star rated on Thumbtack. Your pool is in certified hands.

pricing.headline: Straight-Forward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every quote is honest and itemized. No hidden fees, no pressure to upgrade — just fair pricing for expert pool care.

guarantee.headline: Our "Peerless Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service we perform, we'll come back and make it right at no additional charge. With over 25 years in the industry, our reputation is built on doing things right the first time — and standing behind our work when it matters most.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within a few business days. For urgent equipment repairs, we do our best to accommodate rush requests — just call Chris directly and we'll work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: No contracts and no commitments. We earn your business every single visit through honest work and reliable results. You're free to adjust or cancel service at any time.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We're based in Tomball, Texas and proudly serve the greater Houston metro area. If you're not sure whether you're in our service area, give us a call and we'll let you know.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Peerless Pool Service is fully licensed and insured. We're also HomeAdvisor Screened and Approved, a Top Rated Pro, and hold a 5-star Thumbtack rating for your peace of mind.

faqs.question: Can you handle full pool remodels?
faqs.answer: Yes — we're a turnkey pool remodeler. That means we manage the entire project from design through completion, including finishes, equipment, plumbing, and electrical. One company, one point of contact, no subcontractor headaches.

testimonials.name: HomeAdvisor Customer
testimonials.text: No pressure, no up-selling — just technical knowledge and honest customer service. Peerless delivered top-notch equipment repairs, replacement, and cleaning. Highly recommend.

testimonials.name: Angi Customer
testimonials.text: Chris was very pleasant and prompt. Followed through with everything he quoted and promised. Overall a great experience — I would highly recommend Peerless Pool Service.

testimonials.name: Verified Homeowner
testimonials.text: They adjusted their schedule to mine when I needed a rush heater repair before weekend guests. Got the work done quickly and professionally. Can't ask for more than that.
